source: IndexBox, Sci-Tech Today, The Manila Times, Utility Dive, GovTech

scenes.headline: **Emerging Digital Techs** to Transform Sectors
scenes.sub: Unpacking the Future with Hard Data
scenes.vo: Welcome to the forefront of innovation! Discover the **Emerging Digital Technologies** poised to transform entire sectors in 2026 and beyond.

scenes.heading: Key Trends for 2026

items.title: IoT Edge Controllers Market to Expand by 2035
Small Satellite Tech Sees Economic Boom
AI Infrastructure Drives US Manufacturing Expansion

scenes.vo: Let's dive into the **Key Trends for 2026** that will reshape the future of industry and technology.

scenes.label: Data Center Demand Outpacing US Utility Capacity by 2030
scenes.vo: A monumental milestone ahead: the global energy sector is projected to surpass **over 100 Gigawatts (GW)** of renewable energy capacity additions by the end of 2026.

scenes.title: Projected Growth in Key Sectors by 2030
scenes.vo: Looking ahead to **2030**, projected growth in key sectors like Manufacturing, Healthcare, and Finance is anticipated to skyrocket, driven by digital adoption.

scenes.headline: New here? Subscribe
scenes.vo: And if you're watching The Inference for the first time, and you're into AI news, tools and tech breakdowns, do hit subscribe — we drop a fresh one every day.

scenes.heading: Impact Highlights
scenes.vo: **Impact Highlights**: Enhanced efficiency, reduced operational costs, and unprecedented scalability are just the beginning.
'**AI Infrastructure Boom**' is redefining manufacturing landscapes globally, with Taiwan suppliers leading the charge towards U.S. manufacturing expansion.

scenes.name: IoT Edge Controllers
scenes.vo: At the heart of this revolution are **IoT Edge Controllers**, forecasted to drive the market toward sustained expansion through 2035, fueled by Industrial AI and real-time processing demands.

scenes.title: Growth Projections Compared
scenes.vo: Comparing **Growth Projections**, the IoT Edge Controllers market outpaces peers, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) indicating a booming future.

scenes.headline: Embracing the Digital Future of 2026
scenes.cta: Subscribe to The Inference for More **Tech Insights**
scenes.vo: As we embark on **Embracing the Digital Future of 2026**, one thing is clear: the convergence of these technologies will redefine industry boundaries forever.
